FR.Paris.OpenData.Velo.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for Paris Bicycle Counters CloudEvents on the `paris-bicycle-counters` topic keyed by `{counter_id}`.

FR.Paris.OpenData.Velo.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for Paris Bicycle Counters CloudEvents using the topic hierarchy and retain settings declared in this manifest.

FR.Paris.OpenData.Velo.Counter.name: Counter
FR.Paris.OpenData.Velo.Counter.description: A current transport measurement or status update from Paris open-data bicycle counter feeds. It carries bicycle count observations when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

FR.Paris.OpenData.Velo.BicycleCount.name: BicycleCount
FR.Paris.OpenData.Velo.BicycleCount.description: A current transport measurement or status update from Paris open-data bicycle counter feeds. It carries bicycle count observations when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

FR.Paris.OpenData.Velo.description: Events from Paris Bicycle Counters covering Paris bicycle-counting stations. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

FR.Paris.OpenData.Velo.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of the Paris Bicycle Counters events. It carries the same transport semantics as the base events with MQTT topic routing and retain behavior declared per message.

FR.Paris.OpenData.Velo.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 transport variants for paris-bicycle-counters. All CloudEvents are published to the paris-bicycle-counters address; the subject and application properties mirror the existing Kafka key and MQTT routing axes.

subject.description: AMQP message subject. Mirrors the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key for stable per-entity routing.

x-opt-partition-key.description: Service Bus/Event Hubs partition key. Mirrors the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key so events for the same entity route consistently across transports.

subject.description: AMQP message subject. Mirrors the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key for stable per-entity routing.

x-opt-partition-key.description: Service Bus/Event Hubs partition key. Mirrors the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key so events for the same entity route consistently across transports.

schema.name: Counter
schema.description: A current transport measurement or status update from Paris open-data bicycle counter feeds. It carries bicycle count observations when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

counter_id.description: Unique identifier for the counting channel, combining the site ID and channel ID (mapped from 'id_compteur').

alternates.name: id_compteur
alternates.description: Original French field name in the Paris Open Data API.

counter_name.description: Human-readable name of the counter including street name and direction (mapped from 'nom_compteur').

alternates.name: nom_compteur
alternates.description: Original French field name in the Paris Open Data API.

channel_name.description: Directional channel label for the counter, e.g. 'SE-NO' or 'E-O' (mapped from 'channel_name').

installation_date.description: Date when the counter was installed, in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD).

longitude.description: Longitude of the counter location in decimal degrees (WGS 84).

latitude.description: Latitude of the counter location in decimal degrees (WGS 84).

ce_id.description: Deterministic CloudEvents id for the retained counter reference record.

schema.name: BicycleCount
schema.description: A current transport measurement or status update from Paris open-data bicycle counter feeds. It carries bicycle count observations when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

counter_id.description: Unique identifier for the counting channel (mapped from 'id_compteur').

alternates.name: id_compteur
alternates.description: Original French field name in the Paris Open Data API.

counter_name.description: Human-readable name of the counter including street name and direction (mapped from 'nom_compteur').

alternates.name: nom_compteur
alternates.description: Original French field name in the Paris Open Data API.

count.description: Number of bicycles counted during the one-hour window (mapped from 'sum_counts').

alternates.name: sum_counts
alternates.description: Original French field name in the Paris Open Data API.

date.description: Start of the one-hour counting window in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset.

longitude.description: Longitude of the counter location in decimal degrees (WGS 84).

latitude.description: Latitude of the counter location in decimal degrees (WGS 84).

ce_id.description: Deterministic CloudEvents id composed from counter_id and hourly count date for subscriber deduplication.

description: Paris Bicycle Counters publishes bicycle count observations from Paris open-data bicycle counter feeds for Paris bicycle-counting stations. These events help consumers monitor mobility operations, passenger information, and traffic conditions without polling the upstream source directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for Paris Bicycle Counters, including upstream feed context and bridge deployment notes.
